retry_reason: No failure path exists; if parent is NULL the call is a no-op and should not be retried.
contract_summary: Acquires an additional reference on the fsnotify_mark of an audit_parent. The caller must have a valid pointer (or NULL is safely ignored). After calling, the caller owns one extra reference and must pair with a corresponding put (e.g., audit_put_parent) when the reference is no longer needed. The function does not transfer ownership of the parent pointer itself.
